productDisplayName: Biotique Women Bio Clove Anti Blemish Face Pack
description: This is a purifying anti-blemish pack is blended with pure clove and wild turmeric to control pimples, absorb excess oils and other embedded impurities that can cause acneic conditionsWith regualr use, the complexion looks clear, smooth and vibrantSkin type - For oily and acne prone skinUsage- Apply a thick layer on clean dry face and neck. Avoid eye and mouth areas. Leave on for 15-20 minutes. Rinse with water or damp washcloth. Use daily or as needed
